description_long: This is a commercial jet airliner with a streamlined fuselage, painted primarily white with blue and red accents and the BEA logo on the forward section. The aircraft features a low-mounted, swept-back wing configuration with prominent red coloring on the upper wing surfaces and a blue stripe running along the fuselage. The tail section is a T-tail design, with the horizontal stabilizer mounted atop the vertical fin, which is decorated with a Union Jack motif and the word 'Trident.' Three rear-mounted jet engines are visible, integrated into the fuselage and tail. The landing gear is in a tricycle configuration, with the main gear under the wings and a nose gear beneath the cockpit. The cockpit is located at the forward end of the fuselage, with multiple windows indicating a multi-seat, enclosed design.
description: A white, blue, and red commercial jet airliner with a T-tail, low-swept wings, and three rear-mounted jet engines. Features BEA branding and a Union Jack tail fin.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the fuselage, BEA logo, and the T-tail with Union Jack design; all three rear-mounted engines are visible.
description_view_1: Rear oblique view highlighting the T-tail, swept-back wings with red upper surfaces, and the clustered rear jet engines.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the BEA logo, wing and tail configuration, and the main landing gear beneath the wings.
description_view_3: Front oblique view showing the cockpit windows, nose, and the forward sweep of the wings with red accents.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing, swept-back configuration with no visible winglets and a slight dihedral angle.
attribute_engine_type: Three rear-mounted jet engines integrated into the fuselage and tail section.
attribute_tail_design: T-tail configuration with a single vertical stabilizer and high-mounted horizontal stabilizer.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle retractable landing gear with two main gear units and a single nose gear.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed multi-seat cockpit with multiple windows at the front of the fuselage.
